issue.location: Figure 1 caption at the top of page 2
before_problem: The Figure 1 caption split 'finally' as 'fi- / nally'.
The split appeared in the roadmap caption immediately before the Introduction resumed.

change_summary.summary: Reworded the Figure 1 caption from 'and finally check selected official InternNav navigation rollouts plus paired metrics' to a shorter 'then check selected official InternNav rollouts and paired metrics' phrasing.
change_summary.final_wording: compare matched renders for VLM grounding, then check selected official InternNav rollouts and paired metrics.

observations: The page-2 text layer no longer contains the targeted 'fi- / nally' split in the Figure 1 caption.
The page-2 caption crop shows the roadmap caption now wraps on whole words.
The accepted wording removes redundant 'InternNav navigation' phrasing while keeping the caption's schematic-evidence boundary.
The final contact sheet remains 11 pages with no obvious float, table, or blank-page regression.
Existing Related Work splits such as 'syn- / thetic', 'set- / ting', and 'referen- / tial' remain visible and are outside this round's target.
